---
description: "Analyze the project — understand code structure, trace data flows, assess impact of proposed changes"
agent: "analyzer"
argument-hint: "Describe what to analyze (feature, file, component, or concept)"
---

Perform a deep analysis of the specified area of the Jàngat codebase.

Trace data flows across services, stores, and components. Map dependencies. Assess what would be impacted by changes. Report with file paths and line references.
